_comment_trading_mode: PAPER is the only safe default. To go live: set this to REAL, set alpaca_base_url to the live endpoint, AND a human must type the confirmation_phrase exactly when prompted. REAL mode is session-scoped per strategy 8A.
_comment_total_capital: Set this to match your actual Alpaca paper account balance. The agent re-reads live equity from Alpaca each run; this value is a fallback/sanity bound only.
